title: Dropdown Selections for Scorecard Status
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to select scorecard status values from a dropdown instead of typing free-form text, so that I can ensure consistent and valid status entries across the scorecard.
description:
Replace free-form text input for scorecard status fields with a controlled dropdown menu to improve data quality and user experience.

### Dropdown Options
- Not Started (default selection)
- In Progress
- Blocked
- QA
- Business Review
- Complete

### Implementation Notes
DataTables editor supports several field type plugins for dropdowns. A simple select dropdown is sufficient for this use case.
acceptance_criteria: Status field displays as a dropdown when editing a scorecard row
Dropdown contains exactly six options: Not Started, In Progress, Blocked, QA, Business Review, Complete
Default selection for new rows is 'Not Started'
User cannot enter free-form text in the status field
Selected value persists correctly on save
ux_changes: Replaces the free-form text input for the status column with a dropdown select element. Default selection is 'Not Started'. Six predefined status options are available.
implementation_notes: Leverages DataTables editor field type plugins for the dropdown implementation.
